svg.text: Configure how tips are distributed among staff roles. All calculations exported to payroll automatically.
Only tipped employees (servers, bartenders, bussers) may be included in a tip pool. Non-tipped employees (cooks, managers) CANNOT receive tip pool funds.
Tip credits cannot be taken if tips are pooled with non-tipped employees. Confirm with your labor attorney.
Server keeps % of own tips, shares remainder with support staff
All tips pooled and distributed by hours worked
No sharing — each server keeps their own tips
Only if server ordered bar items
Only if host seated ≥ N tables
Auto-grat is revenue paid as wages — poolable
Servers declare cash tips; included in pool calc
Shift: Wednesday May 27 · Dinner · 4:00 PM – close
📋 IRS 8027: Total tips reported available for Form 8027 (large restaurant reporting).
CSV format • Gusto earnings template • Individual tip declaration forms per server

pos_tip_pool_config: venue_id, model (tip_share|pool|individual), rules jsonb (role→pct) · pos_tip_distributions: shift_id, from_staff_id, to_staff_id, to_role, tip_source (card|cash|auto_grat), amount_cents

calculate_tip_pool(shift_id) Edge Function → runs at shift close or manager trigger · Gusto export: /api/pos/payroll/tip-export?shift_id=X · Cash tip: pos_cash_tip_declarations · IRS 8027: report_8027(year)
